creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/67591c284e34dbfc653674ad2d9f3974f083fc5b/etc/regdomain.xml#L1085-L1092> lines 1089–1090 in 2008: 

>   http://ftp.ics.uci.edu/pub/ietf/http/related/iso3166.txt
>   has the list of codes.

<http://ftp.ics.uci.edu/> is down, <https://downforeveryoneorjustme.com/ftp.ics.uci.edu?proto=http> not just me. 

<https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_3166_country_codes> refers to (amongst other things) <https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html> however unless I'm missing something, there's no comparable .txt file.
